title: April 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 17''' is the 107th day of the year (108th in leap years). There are 258 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Olivia Hussey]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Joe Alaskey]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[George Lucas]] begins writing a story treatment called "The Star Wars."
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 85|''Star Wars'' (1977) 85]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Griffin McElroy]] is born.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 3|''Star Wars Gamer'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 16|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 16]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 44|''Star Wars Magazine UK'' 44]] published.
*2003 – ''[[Positive ID]]'' mini-adventure released.
*[[2006]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 5 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2010]] – "[[Death Trap]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[Last Shot]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[TIE Fighter 1|''TIE Fighter'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion Special 1|''Age of Rebellion Special'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 20|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 20]] published.
*2019 – [[The Triple Dark (junior novelization)|''The Triple Dark'' junior novelization]] published in French.
*[[2020]] – "[[Old Friends Not Forgotten]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Kylo Ren vs. Resistance Rebels]]" is uploaded on YouTube.
*[[2024]] – "[[Into the Breach]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Mace Windu 3|''Mace Windu'' 3]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire 1|''The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
